title: Cream Happy Birthday Balloon Banner, 29PCS 16 Inch 3D Aluminum Letter Banner Sign, Apricot Champagne Gold Ivory White Balloon 18 Inch Star Heart Foil Balloons for Kids, Women, Men Party Supply
seller_info_text: Yishikunli E-commerce Co., Ltd. in Xiamen
features: 【Package Contains】In Paready Cream HAPPY BIRTHDAY Balloons set, you'll receive: 1 x 16 inches cream "HAPPY BIRTHDAY" foil balloon banner, 2 x 18 inches cream star foil balloons, 2 x 18 inches brown heart foil balloons, 4 x 12 inches apricot balloons, 2 x 12 inches metallic champagne gold balloons, 2 x 12 inches metallic rose gold balloons, 2 x 12 inches confetti gold, 4 x 12 inches dusty ivory balloons, 1 roll of 10m white ribbons, 1 balloon dispense, 1 straw for easy inflation.

【Premium Quality】Our Paready Birthday Balloon Set is crafted from high-quality materials to ensure your celebration stays vibrant and fun for hours! Made with long-lasting, self-sealing foil, these foil balloons are long-lasting and easy to handle. The latex balloons are made from high-quality natural latex, making them strong and long-lasting. Whether you inflate them with air or helium, these balloons are designed to stay vibrant throughout the entire party.

【Variety of Color Choices】Paready Birthday Party Decorations include different colors of "HAPPY BIRTHDAY" foil balloons and multiple sizes and colors of latex balloons, you can easily mix and match to create a personalized party atmosphere. Whether you're going for a cute, vibrant vibe or a soft, elegant look, there’s a party balloon combination for your celebration.

【Versatile Usage】This Paready Happy Birthday Balloon Banner Sign is not just for birthday parties—it's ideal for a variety of events! Whether you're hosting a women/girls/men/boys party, themed parties, evening or glamorous events, or any Birth-themed celebration, these party balloons will add the excellent touch of festivity and fun. A variety of color combinations make it a perfect party supply choice that shows personality.

【Gentle Inflation Tips】 For best results: Inflate foil balloons to 80% capacity using the included straw. This preserves the smooth surface for maximum reflective shine and prevents overstretching. Non-latex material ensures easy storage for future reuse.
description: Product description Celebrate in Style with Our Cream Birthday Balloon Set! Transform any space into a dreamy celebration with this elegant balloon set. Whether you're planning a cozy family gathering or a lively birthday party, these beautifully coordinated balloons add warmth and sophistication to your décor effortlessly! Make Your Birthday Unforgettable – Elegant Balloons, Lasting Memories! Perfect for creating a refined yet festive atmosphere, this set ensures every birthday feels extra special. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources.
